name: Calendar, Schedule
description: Timeline-rail agenda view. Lists upcoming events grouped by day, with a thin ink rail connecting per-event nodes and a coloured start-time chip carrying the feed accent. Titles wrap freely so the widget stays legible from 1 up to 4 narrow columns on wide e-ink panels. Pulls from the same calendar_core feeds as the other calendar_* widgets.

choices.label: Fill the cell (up to 3 months of events)

cell_options.name: feeds_filter
cell_options.label: Feed IDs (comma-separated; blank = all enabled)
cell_options.help: Restrict to specific feeds. Leave blank to include every enabled feed configured in calendar_core.

cell_options.name: show_dot_color
cell_options.label: Show per-feed colour dot
cell_options.help: Off makes the layout pure typography; useful on 1-bit panels.

cell_options.name: max_events_total
cell_options.label: Max events across the whole agenda (0 = no cap)
cell_options.help: Caps the total events shown across all days, after sorting chronologically. Stops a single busy day shrinking every row's text to fit. Applied after the per-day cap.

cell_options.name: show_title
cell_options.label: Show widget title
cell_options.help: Renders a 'Schedule' header row at the top so the cell matches the Spectra widget chrome. Off uses the entire cell for the agenda.

cell_options.name: event_title_scale
cell_options.label: Event title size
cell_options.help: Multiplier on the event title font size. 1.0 = default. Raise for more legible titles at the cost of visible event count.

cell_options.name: event_time_scale
cell_options.label: Event time size
cell_options.help: Multiplier on the start-time chip font size.

cell_options.name: event_location_scale
cell_options.label: Event location size
cell_options.help: Multiplier on the location string beneath each event title.

cell_options.name: day_row_padding_em
cell_options.label: Day row spacing
cell_options.help: Vertical padding above + below each day block, in em units so it scales with the auto-fit font size. Lower packs more events on the panel.

cell_options.name: columns
cell_options.label: Layout columns
cell_options.help: Flow the agenda across multiple columns so a longer window (say two weeks) fits in a half-height cell without shrinking every row. Auto grows columns 1 up to 4 until the whole list fits. Days stay atomic (never split across columns), and column-fill packs by real content height, not by day count.
